testcase.failure:
self = <app.tests.test_views.TestView testMethod=test_project_home_GET>
def setUp(self): self.client = Client() self.home_url = reverse('website-home') self.detail_url = reverse('post-detail', args='1') > selPost.object.create( title='post1', content='random post', author = '1') E NameError: name 'selPost' is not defined
